name: SDLC One Rejects One Approves Pipeline
description: Software-delivery workflow with split required assessor outcomes including rejection.
outcome: A rejecting required assessor prevents release even when another assessor approves.

definition.process_instructions: The workflow intentionally drives one assessor to approve and another to reject on an earlier revision before the final cleared revision is produced.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
